text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm on my way to training as usual,
when...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Pfft, hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I catch Meisho Doto laughing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, th-this isn't what it looks like! This is, um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to her story, a laundry mishap has
coated the reverse side of her clothes with lint
balls.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-so, it feels a little prickly to wear and k-kinda...
tickles!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I p-plan to buy some new clothes tomorrow, so
this will have to do for today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, if she can't concentrate, it might make
training more difficult.
choice_data_list:
I'll call off training so you can use the rest of
today to go shopping.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! B-but, this won't affect my running. I'll be
f—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Hehehe!
choice_data_list: Attempt to power through today's training.
Err on the safe side and take the day off.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yay! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll work really hard since you listened to my
selfish request!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft, hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-stop it! Laughing means I'm losing my
concentration... I have to give this my very all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What do we have here? You're in quite the high
spirits, Doto! But you can't out spirit me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... I think I need a little break...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek! I feel all itch-itchy!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Is there something bothering her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the setbacks, Meisho Doto manages to
power through training!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm glad this is working out. I'm finally
used to the feel!
choice_data_list: It looked like you were having a rough time.
It looked like you were having a rough time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, no... this is all my fault to begin with, so I
can't complain.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Considering that, I feel like I got in a lot more
exercise than usual.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I guess everything was all right in the end... hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's session seems to have contributed to
Meisho Doto's growth after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm a-all right. I'm sure the ticklish feeling will go
away with the right amount of concentration!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyah?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oof, owie ow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's lost a lot of her ability to concentrate. If we
go on like this, she could get injured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's definitely best to give it a rest for today.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: B-but...
choice_data_list:
In exchange, let's give tomorrow double the
effort.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh! O-okay. Let's do that!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Understood. So, I'll go buy new clothes today.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ummmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes off to shop for new clothes, and the
next day, we return to our regular training
schedule.
